name: NovaTech
description: Consumer electronics and smart home devices

activeBriefs.title: Smart Speaker Launch Campaign
activeBriefs.description: Looking for tech reviewers to feature our new AI-powered smart speaker. Focus on honest reviews and unboxing content.

activeBriefs.title: Home Automation Series
activeBriefs.description: Seeking creators to showcase our smart home ecosystem in everyday use. Authentic lifestyle integration preferred.

name: FuelUp Nutrition
description: Plant-based protein supplements and performance nutrition for athletes and fitness enthusiasts

activeBriefs.title: New Protein Line Launch
activeBriefs.description: Promoting our new plant-based protein powder line. Looking for fitness creators who can demonstrate the product in their routines and share honest taste reviews.

name: Wanderlux Hotels
description: Boutique hotel chain with locations across Asia and Europe, focused on cultural immersion experiences

activeBriefs.title: Tokyo Property Launch
activeBriefs.description: Our new Tokyo boutique hotel opens in April. Looking for travel creators to stay and create content showcasing the property, neighborhood, and local experiences.

activeBriefs.title: Cultural Immersion Series
activeBriefs.description: Ongoing partnership opportunity for travel creators to visit multiple Wanderlux properties and create a branded series around cultural immersion.

name: ThreadEco
description: Sustainable fashion brand using recycled materials. Affordable ethical clothing for Gen Z and millennials.

activeBriefs.title: Spring Collection Showcase
activeBriefs.description: Looking for fashion and lifestyle creators to style and review pieces from our Spring 2026 collection. Focus on sustainability angle.

name: BrewCraft Beverages
description: Artisan craft beverages — cold brew coffee, kombucha, and functional drinks. Premium non-alcoholic alternatives.

activeBriefs.title: Cold Brew Summer Campaign
activeBriefs.description: Seeking food and lifestyle creators to feature our new cold brew line in recipe or morning routine content. Authentic integration preferred over hard sell.

activeBriefs.title: Kombucha Taste Test Challenge
activeBriefs.description: Fun taste test format — creators try our kombucha line and compare to competitors. Looking for entertaining, genuine reactions.

name: PixelForge Games
description: Indie game studio known for atmospheric adventure games. Upcoming title: Echoes of the Void.

activeBriefs.title: Echoes of the Void — Early Access Launch
activeBriefs.description: Looking for gaming streamers and YouTubers to play the first 2 hours of our new game during launch week. Authentic first impressions content.

activeBriefs.title: Community Build-Up Campaign
activeBriefs.description: Pre-launch hype content — behind-the-scenes, lore deep dives, and developer interviews. Looking for creators with strong community engagement.
